posts.author: Kmk (kmk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Continuing the discussion from Remove monday.com branding from Forms:

Hi, yes we can use Workforms with the monday.com brand removed, but now you guy add a footer message to say: Never submit passwords or credit card details through Workforms…

If you put that warm message for us, why you can not just leave that message without advertising again your brand?
